description: Dive into the world of real estate with our meticulously designed email template, perfect for scheduling property visits. The template employs a seamless blend of light green and vibrant orange hues, reflecting the warmth of a home. Crafted in a crisp sans serif font, the template is easy to navigate and read. The layout includes fields for filling in the address and location details of the property, complete with a map for better understanding. It also contains a select date option to schedule a visit at your convenience. The template also provides room to include agent details, ensuring a personalized touch. This template is an ideal choice for real estate notifications, making the process of scheduling a visit to your dream house an effortless task.
short_description: Discover our real estate email template, designed for effortless scheduling of property visits. Features include a vibrant color palette, sans serif font, and easy-to-fill fields for address, location, and agent details. Schedule your dream house visit today.

designer.description: I've started to use Photoshop when I was 13. From 2009 to 2014, I've been a part of 5 Art Groups, doing Illustrations and Photo-manipulations, collaborating with over 150 Artists from all the Planet. In 2014, during my final school's exams, I've got my first Freelance Job at a Milan based Agency. Thanks to that first project, I started my Career as a Freelance Independent UI & Web Designer. Today, I help brands improve their online and digital presence, building usable, unique & beautiful products, mostly collaborating with Italian & US Agencies and Startups.
